source_discovery_method: manual source-specific discovery required before public enablement
list_fetch_method: brittle source-specific fetch only in canary mode until certified
detail_fetch_method: May be required when list columns omit date/location.
pagination_method: Tokenized REST/AJAX pages; shape varies by tenant.
source_job_id_rule: preserve strongest raw id, requisition id, job id, vacancy id, or stable URL id
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: Saved REST fixture scans source columns for country, city/state, or remote location evidence.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: Saved REST fixture scans source columns for country, city/state, or remote location evidence.
posting_date_rule: Scan columns and accept only date-like values; reject boolean values.
rate_limit: quarantine-only or disabled; canary budget only

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: accepted rows must pass title/company/canonical_url and row-level quality gate

runner_interface.discover: manual source-specific discovery required before public enablement
runner_interface.fetchList: brittle source-specific fetch only in canary mode until certified
runner_interface.fetchDetail: May be required when list columns omit date/location.
runner_interface.normalize: server/ingestion/parserContract.js normalized posting shape plus source-specific normalizer
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: add or run bounded detail-refetch certification for missing geo/remote evidence
